live_snapshot_input.missing_source_behavior: visible not_configured coverage; no fixture fallback

additional_data_needed: observed bid-ask spread and order-book execution-quality snapshots
intraday bars and exact decision-to-review latency
direct catalyst, calendar, derivatives, and on-chain evidence with point-in-time lineage
more independent matured episodes across routes, regimes, and data-quality cohorts

point_in_time_universe.residual_limitation: retained candidate pool has delisting survivorship

required_live_lineage: distinct request ledger and provider source artifact
valid SHA-256 for both lineage artifacts

authorization.authorization_absent_behavior: safe blocked result, no provider call, credential-free pilot audit, pointer unchanged

required_checks: fresh full strict doctor with zero blockers

pipeline: canonical provenance v2 and distinct request/source lineage
bounded per-asset temporal history and warmup evidence
optional explicit local calendar snapshot and canonical copy
pending outcomes and shared campaign-outcome refresh
operator state and dashboard read model

catalyst_attribution_policy.unit_of_evidence: one exact source bound to one exact market anomaly
catalyst_attribution_policy.anomaly_binding: digest of anomaly id, UTC clock, provider/content identity, canonical asset, snapshot identity, state, bucket, and market snapshot
catalyst_attribution_policy.causal_eligibility: antecedent_or_contemporaneous plus direct official evidence or a validated direct beneficiary with a strong impact path
catalyst_attribution_policy.semantic_role_contract: only the eight canonical catalyst-frame roles; unrecognized explicit roles are noncausal
catalyst_attribution_policy.scheduled_future_event: may be scheduled_anticipation only when its source was already public
catalyst_attribution_policy.source_url_credentials: credential paths or userinfo rejected; all query and fragment data removed
catalyst_attribution_policy.decision_policy: once attribution is supplied, malformed or exclusively noncausal evidence cannot fall back to hostname or accepted-count confirmation
catalyst_attribution_policy.foreign_or_mixed_binding: reject the complete supplied attribution set and retain rejection telemetry
research_basis: MacKinlay 1997 event-study timing and event-window discipline
Miller 2023 event-study design and interpretation guidance

source_independence_policy.runtime_boundary: one-for-one replacement of legacy raw-row or hostname diversity inputs only
source_independence_policy.missing_invalid_or_failed_assessment: explicit unassessed or rejected zero promotion
research_basis: Rodier and Carter 2020 online near-duplicate news detection

reports: attempt audit publication operations and current-authority states
next eligible observation time and command

human_review_timing.completion_command: CONFIRM=1 make radar-review-timing-complete RADAR_REVIEW_NAMESPACE=<exact> RADAR_REVIEW_IDEA_ID=<exact> RADAR_REVIEWER_ALIAS=<alias> PYTHON=.venv/bin/python
human_review_timing.first_view_command: CONFIRM=1 make radar-review-timing-view RADAR_REVIEW_NAMESPACE=<exact> RADAR_REVIEW_IDEA_ID=<exact> RADAR_REVIEWER_ALIAS=<alias> PYTHON=.venv/bin/python
source_bindings: artifact namespace run revision and operator-state digest
final publication and operations receipt digests

daily_operations.dashboard_restart: exact owned job may bootstrap after publication receipt; GET and HEAD remain 503 until operations receipt and an exact-authority stable-PID HTTP probe
daily_operations.failed_authority_policy: restore previous pointer or invalidate only failed new pointer

final_publication_contract.later_terminal_failure: a later failed terminal row for the same cycle invalidates the earlier success receipt
final_publication_contract.pointer_mutation: descriptor-anchored transaction across publish rollback invalidation and legacy repair; artifact-root pathname replacement cannot redirect pointer IO
final_publication_contract.post_operations_probe: bounded trusted HTTP 200 with exact namespace run revision and operator-digest headers plus the same positive owned PID before and after
final_publication_contract.startup_transition: publication receipt required; current research remains 503 until operations receipt

execution_quality_readiness.authorization_boundary: confirmed public-market-data research scope does not create runtime provider authorization or allow credentials, private data, orders, or trading
execution_quality_readiness.bybit_public_reachability: unverified after recorded region-restricted 403; fail closed without proxy VPN or region bypass
execution_quality_readiness.eligible_instrument_selection_rule: top 30 liquidity-ranked Decision Radar assets intersected with exact active Bybit LinearPerpetual Trading USDT-quoted USDT-settled non-prelisting contracts, then frozen in the Protocol-v2 annex
execution_quality_readiness.intraday_authorization_boundary: already-present RSI_DECISION_RADAR_BYBIT_INTRADAY_LIVE=1 plus CONFIRM=1; never inherited from execution-quality authorization
execution_quality_readiness.intraday_live_prerequisite: one genuine immutable execution-quality capture for the same current authority plus a separate explicit authorization boundary
execution_quality_readiness.intraday_review_export_selection: latest complete pointer-selected capture only; fully revalidated from exact raw responses
execution_quality_readiness.live_adapter_contract: exact authoritative Radar generation; separate runtime authorization plus CONFIRM=1; at most two public GETs per asset; no retries, redirects, ambient proxies, credentials, private data, orders, trading, or sends; capture mode preserves exact accepted response bytes, request timing, normalized observations, manifest, completion receipt, and latest pointer
execution_quality_readiness.jurisdiction_and_account_eligibility: owner confirmed 2026-07-17 for the selected research scope
execution_quality_readiness.protocol_v2_input_quality_rule: a complete fresh capture may be input-quality eligible but remains ineligible as Protocol-v2 evidence until the sealed annex explicitly binds its immutable capture ID
execution_quality_readiness.public_private_data_boundary: public market data only; no credentials or private account data
reports: exact active-contract identity and top-30 intersection
USDT spread depth and price-impact metrics
execution_quality_readiness.rollback_disable_command: unset RSI_DECISION_RADAR_BYBIT_EXECUTION_QUALITY_LIVE; no provider process, private-data path, or order path exists
execution_quality_readiness.unit_boundary: offline normalization remains USDT-denominated and never silently relabels USDT as USD

focused_guard.release_sequence: run in extracted source-with-artifacts checkout immediately before verify-fast

daily_operations_installation.authorization_boundary: requires explicit CONFIRM=1 and never embeds provider authorization
daily_operations_installation.expected_provider_activity: readiness none; eligible installed cycle at most one already-authorized CoinGecko request
daily_operations_installation.implication: without installation the operator maintains freshness manually

execution_venue_and_spread_provider.authorization_boundary: Bybit public collection requires already-present RSI_DECISION_RADAR_BYBIT_EXECUTION_QUALITY_LIVE=1 and never creates authorization, credentials, private-data, order, or trading permission
execution_venue_and_spread_provider.expected_provider_activity: readiness/status none; an authorized and CONFIRM=1 capture uses at most two public GETs per exact current Radar asset with no retries and seals only complete exact-response evidence
execution_venue_and_spread_provider.implication: spread remains unavailable until a fresh authoritative generation, separate runtime authorization, honest Bybit reachability, and one valid immutable capture all pass; even then Protocol-v2 evidence eligibility waits for annex binding

official_calendar_acquisition.authorization_boundary: acquire requires already-present RSI_DECISION_RADAR_MACRO_CALENDAR_LIVE=1; BLS also needs an honest contact
official_calendar_acquisition.expected_provider_activity: readiness none; authorized acquire at most one request per configured source
official_calendar_acquisition.implication: calendar remains not configured unless genuine local source exports are imported
official_calendar_acquisition.rollback_disable_command: none; the program never creates authorization or installs a service

phone_access.authorization_boundary: private or public enable requires its exact CONFIRM=1 command

outcome_policy.empirical_review_feedback: optional append-only preference metadata with no automatic scoring or policy effect
outcome_policy.maturation_policy: declared canonical primary horizon only; pending until due and sufficient observed price lineage exists, due_missing_price when due without sufficient lineage, then mature deterministically

empirical_research_lab.name: Decision Radar Empirical Validation and Calibration Lab v1

product_layers.unknown_catalyst_policy: soft explanatory-confidence penalty and risk input, not a universal visibility blocker

purpose: Make Decision Model v2 one internally consistent source of trader-facing research truth without authorizing execution.

route_definitions.actionable_watch: Actionable research that passes identity, freshness, liquidity, spread, turnover, manipulation, dedupe, and safety gates.
route_definitions.calendar_risk: Scheduled risk backed by actual canonical calendar evidence; calendar context alone does not create direction.
route_definitions.dashboard_watch: Visible non-actionable research, including otherwise-sufficient ideas with unavailable spread.
route_definitions.diagnostic: Hard-blocked, malformed, suspicious, stale, duplicate, control, or otherwise non-promotable evidence retained for audit.
route_definitions.fade_exhaustion_review: Fresh exhaustion or crowding evidence for human review, never Event Alpha-created TRIGGERED_FADE.
route_definitions.high_confidence_watch: Actionable research with the strongest current evidence and execution-quality checks.
route_definitions.rapid_market_anomaly: Fresh, liquid, urgent market dislocation that passes actionable execution-quality gates; catalyst may remain unknown.
route_definitions.risk_watch: Unscheduled downside or integrity risk without attached scheduled-calendar evidence.

temporal_market_baseline_policy.fixture_and_mock_cache_scope: generation-local only; never seeds live history
